steps.title: Factor out GCD first
steps.content:
The expression $7680x^4 - 2430$ shares a common factor of 30. Factoring this out: $$7680x^4 - 2430 = 30(256x^4 - 81)$$
This reduces the problem to analyzing $256x^4 - 81$.

steps.title: Difference of squares decomposition
steps.content:
Recognize $256x^4$ as $(16x^2)^2$ and $81$ as $9^2$. Apply the difference of squares formula: $$256x^4 - 81 = (16x^2)^2 - 9^2 = (16x^2 - 9)(16x^2 + 9)$$
Now $16x^2 - 9$ can be further factored as $$(16x^2 - 9) = (4x - 3)(4x + 3)$$
Full factorization: $$30(4x - 3)(4x + 3)(16x^2 + 9)$$

steps.title: Compare to answer choices
steps.content: The factor $16x^{2}+9$ matches one factor, and $4x+3$ and $30$ are also directly present. The expression $4x^{2}-3$ never appears in the valid factorization. B is correct.
